title: the best way to express yourself on your web page

transcript.text: Hello this video is the best way to express yourself on your web page on your website if you know if you want to just get your ideas across or anything um I discovered this a couple months ago um what I what I did what I do is and I was doing it with these alien pages if you go to my website and click on the flying saucer you can go on all the different alien pages and I'm collecting information about it but and like what I want to do like what I'm doing is I'm I'm just cutting and pasting Wikipedia articles

And the things you know that I'm writing about and then I'm collecting pictures about the things that I'm um writing about and putting them on my own Flickr site and then embedding the pictures from Flickr onto um the web page um not not putting the pictures on my actual server because they load a lot faster um if they're on Flickr and the page it loads because you're only loading the the uh the text of the embedment of the videos

And you're not actually loading the videos so the page just pops up there quickly so you can have hundreds of uh videos um I mean well embedded videos from YouTube is what I have and also pictures from Flickr um and you know and then of course you can click on the picture on the web page and then you can see it from Flickr in the mat in the original huge size um so what I do is I have um I have 300 pixel wide um pictures and video
